summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SSE message streaming feature for Context Hub. All backend SSE endpoints and frontend streaming functionality are working correctly. Successfully verified word-by-word streaming, loading states, streaming cursor, and message persistence.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chat/stream returns proper SSE events (start, chunk, done)
Backend: POST /api/chat non-streaming fallback still works correctly
Backend: SSE streaming sends 4 chunks with proper event format
Backend: Message persistence after streaming completes
Frontend: Loading dots appear before first chunk arrives
Frontend: Streaming cursor (blinking blue bar) appears during streaming
Frontend: Text appears progressively word-by-word during streaming
Frontend: Streaming cursor disappears when streaming completes
Frontend: Messages are properly persisted after streaming (verified by session reload)
Frontend: Sequential messaging works correctly in same session
Frontend: Session state management works correctly after page refresh
Integration: SSE streaming integrates properly with existing chat interface
Integration: Tab-based interface maintains streaming state correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% (11/11 endpoints working, including new SSE streaming)
